chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 03 of 2001 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1055/2024 2. For Evidence. 24.02.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Najeeb Jamali, Advocate for the Respondent No.2. Mr. Abdul Qayyum Abbasi, Advocate for Respondent Nos. 4 & 5. Adnan Masood Butt, Director of Respondent No.6 present in person. ********** None is present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. A perusal of the previous Order Sheets reflects the same. This matter has remained pending for last 25 years without any significant progress. It appears that the Petitioner seems to be not interested in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
